positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial map and woodland silhouette composition. The main subject is a grouping of geometrically arranged constellations (like the Big Dipper and Orion, stylized) intertwined with minimalist forest elements such as stylized crescent moons, winding vines, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and sharp-edged mountain peaks. Style must be inspired by Art Deco linework meeting modern negative space design (stencil/etching effect). Use a limited palette of deep indigo blue, sapphire turquoise, glowing neon gold, and matte black. Composition must be perfectly centered, symmetrical, and highly scalable. Focus on strong, uninterrupted silhouettes, stark contrast, and clean, bold linework suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Flat graphic design, vector art, woodcut etching style, zero gradients, poster art.
negative: photorealism, 3d rendering, grunge, messy, busy, text, logo, signature, watermark, blur, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, messy linework, gradients, dust, grain
